name: Endora

sheet.name: Endora
sheet.background_story: People are unsure of the true identity of  Endora. Lots of speculation has been made, with nothing certain. Except subtle magic seems to happen around her. Secretly she has vowed to try to make the Forsaken Lands a happier place, even if just by a little. It is rumored that Josiah Kinship has witnessed her secretly doing fortuitous magic spells for the pilgrims she meets. She is also prone to little pranks.

description: People are unsure of the true identity of  Endora. Lots of speculation has been made, with nothing certain. Except subtle magic seems to happen around her. Secretly she has vowed to try to make the Forsaken Lands a happier place, even if just by a little. It is rumored that Josiah Kinship has witnessed her secretly doing fortuitous magic spells for the pilgrims she meets. She is also prone to little pranks.
